name: clinsearch_v3
description: **The most complete free AI research assistant for medical professionals.**

scripts.check:js: awk '/<script>/{flag=1;next}/<\/script>/{flag=0}flag' frontend/index.html > /tmp/clinsearch-inline.js && node --check /tmp/clinsearch-inline.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const acorn=require('acorn'); const src=fs.readFileSync('/tmp/clinsearch-inline.js','utf8'); acorn.parse(src,{ecmaVersion:'latest'}); console.log('JS parse ok')"
